message:
fix(core): harden compressed extent bounds checks and parse ext4 inline data via ibody xattrs

Add explicit error returns (instead of silent truncation) when
decompressed btrfs extent data is shorter than expected, and when
disk_num_bytes exceeds addressable size. Replace silent skip with
Corruption error for out-of-bounds decompressed slice access.

Rewrite ext4 inline data assembly to properly parse ibody xattrs
via ffs_ondisk::parse_ibody_xattrs() and extract the system.data
(name_index=7, name="data") continuation value, instead of blindly
skipping a 4-byte magic header from the raw xattr area.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
